vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, I spent a vast amount of time exploring the woods behind my house.

vocab.meaning: những hành động/cuộc phiêu lưu mạo hiểm
vocab.example: My weekends were characterized by adventurous exploits, like climbing the tallest trees in the local orchard.

vocab.meaning: một hoạt động theo đuổi đơn độc/cá nhân
vocab.example: Drawing was a solitary pursuit that allowed me to retreat into my own little world for hours on end.
I was fond of strategy games because they helped stimulate the intellect while being incredibly entertaining.

vocab.meaning: khuynh hướng/thiên hướng tự nhiên đối với cái gì
vocab.example: Even as a toddler, I had a natural proclivity for music, often trying to play melodies on a toy xylophone.

vocab.meaning: niềm vui sướng không bị kiềm chế/tự do
vocab.example: There was a sense of unfettered joy in running through the rain without a care in the world.

vocab.meaning: bản tính tò mò/thích học hỏi
vocab.example: Driven by an inquisitive nature, I used to take apart old household gadgets just to see how they functioned.

vocab.meaning: tạo dựng những mối quan hệ bền vững
vocab.example: Street games like hide-and-seek were essential to forge lasting bonds with the children in my neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm thông qua tiếp xúc/xúc giác
vocab.example: Playing with clay provided a wonderful tactile experience that encouraged me to experiment with different shapes.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động thời thơ ấu điển hình/tinh túy nhất
vocab.example: Building forts out of sofa cushions is surely a quintessential childhood activity for many people.
